# http4k-template-rocker Reference

Rocker template engine integration with code-generated template models.

## Construction

```kotlin
val templates = RockerTemplates()

val renderer = templates.CachingClasspath()
val renderer = templates.HotReload()
```

## ViewModel

ViewModels must extend `RockerViewModel` (which extends Rocker's `DefaultRockerModel`):

```kotlin
// Generated by Rocker from .rocker.html template files
class MyView : RockerViewModel() {
    // fields and builder methods generated from template @args
}
```

## Template Syntax

```rocker
@args (String name, java.util.List<org.example.Item> items)
<h1>@name</h1>
<ul>
  @for (item : items) {
    <li>@item.getName() - @item.getPrice()</li>
  }
</ul>
```

## Gotchas

- **Code generation required**: Rocker generates Java model classes from `.rocker.html` templates at compile time. Add the Rocker Gradle/Maven plugin.
- **RockerViewModel base class**: ViewModels must extend `RockerViewModel`, not just implement `ViewModel`.
- **HotReload via RockerRuntime**: Sets `RockerRuntime.getInstance().isReloading = true` for development.
- **Base directory ignored**: `CachingClasspath` and `Caching` ignore the directory parameter — Rocker manages its own template resolution.
